title: Totem Reskin
description: This datapack lets you change the Totem of Undying’s texture to any custom design while keeping its original function. Just replace the texture file—no gameplay changes, just a fresh look! Works with resource packs for easy customization.
body:
### Give Every Player Their Own Signature Survival Charm
Tired of everyone using the same old golden totem? Spice up your server with **Totem Reskin!** Whether it's a dragon emblem, a meme, or a custom clan symbol, players can now revive in style—without changing gameplay.

### Why Your Server Needs This
-  **Unique Player Identity** – Let everyone show off their own totem design.
-  **No Mods Required** – Works in vanilla Minecraft with datapacks.
-  **Perfect for Factions & RPGs** – Assign team-themed totems or rare cosmetic unlocks.
-  **Admin Control** – Set defaults, assign textures, or let players submit their own.

### How It Works
- **Admins Set It Up** – Configure .json and tweak .mcfunction files.
  
- **Players Get Creative** – Submit their custom textures (16x16 PNG format).
  
- **The Server Goes Wild** – Watch as every death becomes a personalized spectacle!

- **Easy Access** - Uses /trigger for easy access for all player.

### Perfect For
- **Survival Multiplayer (SMP) Servers** – Stand out with your own totem.
  
- **Roleplay & Faction Servers** – Match your team’s theme.
  
- **Events & Contests** – Host a "Best Totem Design" competition!

Get Started Now!
Drop in the datapack, tweak the configs, and let players unleash their creativity. Who said cheating death had to look boring?

### Required Resource Pack
[Totem Reskin Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-reskin-resource-pack-(required-for-datapack))

**(Note: Requires basic JSON editing—but i have included clear instructions in config.txt!)**

## **Watch For Preview**
